description: multi-turn: turn 1 is a confident build request, turn 2 invalidates its core assumption - expected final position is back in exploration
turns: Set up a Redis caching layer for our product API - we've decided on Redis, go ahead and give me the config.
Wait - our infra team just told me we can't run Redis, we only have Postgres. And honestly I'm no longer sure caching is even the fix.
